title: helinus lanceolatus var. tomentella
intro: Helinus lanceolatus var. tomentella, a variety of the Helinus lanceolatus plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cistaceae. It is often used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Helinus lanceolatus var. tomentella include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate digestive issues, and act as an antiseptic. Herbal preparations of this plant often involve infusions or decoctions, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
